claim_boundary: Publisher PDF acquisition was attempted for the FRC reference papers needed by the B.8/B.10/B.11 workstream. Copyrighted PDFs are not committed. Accessible publisher landing or redirect artifacts are cached only under ignored internal documentation paths; this manifest records provenance and blocked download status.

papers.citation: L. C. Steinhauer, Review of field-reversed configurations, Physics of Plasmas 18, 070501 (2011).
papers.notes: The accepted no-rotation FRC implementation already encodes the Steinhauer analytical profiles used by B.10. PDF and article landing requests returned HTTP 403 from the publisher endpoint during this acquisition pass.

papers.citation: J. Slough, G. Votroubek, and C. Pihl, Creation of a high-temperature plasma through merging and compression of supersonic field reversed configuration plasmoids, Nuclear Fusion 51, 053008 (2011).
papers.notes: No machine-readable Figure 5 trajectory was acquired. B.11 remains blocked on public digitized Slough data or a human/manual extraction workflow.
